rulings.Case Title: COSTANZO BUZZELLI et al VS. MARY DEBENEDETTI, AS TRUSTEE FOR THE MARY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 08, 2015 line 3. DEFENDANT MARY DEBENEDETTI, AS TRUSTEE FOR THE MARY, HANFORD-FREUND & CO, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication DENIED. Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Triabe issued of fact re: UMF 1, 13, 17. Motion fro Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350 ("¿the specific cause of action, affirmative defense, claims for damages, or issues of duty must be stated specifically in the notice of motion and be repeated, verbatim, in the separate statement of undisputed material facts.")= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALEXIOS DIMITRIOU VS. ANDREW DIMITRIOU ET AL

rulings.Case Title: MIKHAIL VAYNBERG VS. KRISTIE MILLER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Judgment Per To Breach Of Stipulation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 08, 2015 line 10. PLAINTIFF MIKHAIL VAYNBERG's Motion for entry of Judgment Pursuant To Breach Of Stipulation OFF CALENDAR, untimely per CCP 1005. On May 1, 2015 Plaintiff was ordered to file a regularly noticed motion. Regularly noticed motions are subject to CCP 1005 requirements. = (501/REQ)
